Security First

All smart contracts are open source and deployed on Stacks blockchain, secured by Bitcoin's proof-of-work. Verify contract code on the explorer.

A
Aegis Vault

Secure, non-custodial STX staking protocol on the Stacks blockchain. Earn competitive rewards with flexible lockup periods.
